§6Schrabidium Hammer§f is a powerful crafting tool made from §bSchrabidium§f.

§eUses:§f
• Required for working with the hardest materials
• Enables recipes that standard tools cannot perform
• Essential for end-game crafting

§c§4RADIOACTIVE:§f
Made from Schrabidium - handle with appropriate protection.

§eTip:§f Keep this hammer available for difficult crafting recipes that require exceptional force.
